description: to be dumb (but not deaf also, like 2974 properly); figuratively, to be calm (as quiet water)
origin: from ????? (silence, i.e. a hush; properly, muteness, i.e. involuntary stillness, or inability to speak; and thus differing from g4602, which is rather a voluntary refusal or indisposition to speak, although the terms are often used synonymously)
